tools.name: markovian_stamp
tools.description: Commit any data (an AI output, a decision, a record) to the Markovian chain and get back a verifiable, tamper-evident provenance stamp (canonical markovian-provenance/v1). It proves the data existed and was committed at this time; it does NOT assert the data is correct (provenance, not truth). No wa

tools.name: markovian_verify
tools.description: Independently verify a Markovian stamp by its merkle_root against the public verifier, with no key or account. Use this to confirm a stamped record existed at its claimed time and has not been altered since. Returns the verifier payload (type:external_stamp, verified:true when the commitment matches

tools.name: markovian_trace
tools.description: Walk and verify a stamp's full provenance lineage by merkle_root. Use this when a stamp was created with derived_from links, to map what an output was built from. Returns a MAP of the graph (not a yes/no verdict): each node carries hash_binds and anchored, each edge carries edge_verified, and `valid
